description: Initial screen state showing a dark overlay with instructions to share the window and a small webcam feed of the participant.
frame_description: A dark screen with white text instructions for screen sharing and a small inset video of the user.

description: Task instructions are progressively typed out on the screen, explaining the scenario of booking a domestic flight in Australia using Flight Centre.
frame_description: The screen displays the full text of the user's task instructions on a dark background.

description: User hovers the cursor over the "Open" button at the bottom of the instruction text.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over a small "Open" button below the task instructions.

description: User clicks the "Open" button.
frame_description: The "Open" button is clicked, triggering a transition.

description: The instruction overlay disappears, and the screen briefly shows a button to repeat instructions before transitioning to the browser.
frame_description: The previous instructions are gone, replaced by a "Repeat the task instructions" button on a dark background.

description: The browser navigates to the Flight Centre website.
page_title: Flights: Book & Fly with Flight Centre
frame_description: The browser window loads the Flight Centre homepage.

description: The Flight Centre homepage finishes loading its main content, including a large promotional banner for a "Tropical Islands Sale".
frame_description: The Flight Centre homepage is fully loaded, showing a red header and a large banner with tropical images.

description: The flight search widget updates to show default search parameters (Return, 1 traveller, Economy, Adelaide origin).
frame_description: The search bar at the top of the page populates with default values.

description: User hovers the cursor over the "Where to?" destination input field in the search bar.
frame_description: The cursor moves towards and hovers over the destination input field in the search widget.

description: User clicks on the "Where to?" input field.
frame_description: The destination input field is activated by a click.

description: A dropdown menu appears below the destination field, showing popular Australian cities like Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, and Perth.
frame_description: A destination suggestion dropdown menu is visible below the search bar.

description: User hovers the cursor over several destination options in the dropdown list, including Sydney and Melbourne.
frame_description: The cursor moves through the list of suggested cities in the dropdown.

description: User clicks on the date selection field, currently showing "Fri, 27 Feb - Sun, 1 Mar".
frame_description: The user clicks the date range field in the search widget.

description: The "Travel dates" modal window opens, displaying calendars for February and March 2026.
frame_description: A calendar modal overlay appears on the screen.
